description: The Marketing Director needs a list of high-value corporate customers for a VIP appreciation campaign. Using the 'Sample Order Lines' dataset in Oracle Analytics Desktop, extract a list of customers in the 'Corporate' segment with a profit of $5,000 or more. The output must include the Customer Name, Customer Segment, and Profit columns. Save the resulting data as a CSV file named vip_corporate_customers.csv to C:\Users\Docker\Documents\.
